reviews.comment:
PÉSIMO SERVICIO. La demora que manejan SIEMPRE ESTA estación de servicio es increíble. los operadores de cada isla es realmente una pérdida de tiempo para todos y para la empresa.
El servicio es desastroso, lentitud para cobrar para cargar para todo.
A pesar de tenerla enfrente no vuelo más.

(Translated by Google)
TERRIBLE SERVICE. The delays at THIS gas station are ALWAYS unbelievable. The attendants at each pump are a complete waste of time for everyone and for the company.
The service is disastrous; it's slow to pay, slow to fill up, slow to refuel, slow to pay. Despite having it right across the street, I'm never flying there again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLMXNyVnVRRRAB
